name: @victorhg/pi-last-session
description: Manages saving, refreshing, and restoring the Pi coding session context.

commands.name: save-session
commands.description: Compact and save current session context

commands.name: refresh-session
commands.description: Save current session, start new, and restore context

commands.name: last-session
commands.description: Read the last saved session context

author: Victor Hugo Germano
